title: Simply 3D Extras
description: A add-on for Simply 3D with more blocks
body:
## Simply 3D Extras

This page is for addons to the Simply 3D pack  
[![Shileds io badge](https://img.shields.io/modrinth/dt/F8BTcrd9?color=Green&label=Simply%203D%20Dowloads%3A)](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/simply3d)  
Click to go to the page!

This pack turns the utility blocks into 3D models, but does not over do it.  
I only use 1/0.75/0.5/0.25 indents or raises to keep inline with the same 3D style as the item frame.
These blocks are not utility blocks but I think they still would work nice when they are 3D, Hope you like them!  



![A render of all models](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/hWEZnfJs/images/4aafb2a85991428d7ab662a00c33048f17f92158.png)

(Soon)
![A render of all models](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/hWEZnfJs/images/4bc2ec221a68b4aa4cc9183783aaa83e705be0cc.png)

### No Enough Animations Support
There is a version for NEA holding the lanters in your hand with a 3D model (also one not in my style)
https://modrinth.com/mod/not-enough-animations

![A render of all models](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/hWEZnfJs/images/89edb5d3a64d8f26df443a21e7f569d770412f58.png)

<details>
<summary>Blocks That Have A Model (Extras)</summary>

- Pumkin
- Carved Pumkin
- Jack o'Lantern
- Hay Bale
- Dried Kelp Block
- Sculk Shrieker
- End Portal Frame
- TNT

</details>

<details>
<summary>Blocks That Have A Model (Lanterns)</summary>

- Lantern
- Soul Lantern
- Chains

</details>

This pack could with a lot of other pack as it still uses the vanilla textures and only modifys the models, as long as a pack doesn't change positions of certain details it would work.
> Make sure this texture pack is on-top of all the other packs.

##### In the future I plan to also add a Redstone, Rails/Ladders and Greenery add-on to this page so stay tuned!
